{{Listen|filename=pkn49b.flac|title=PKN-49|description=A PKN-49 makes a noise}}
The '''Royal Naboo PKN-49''' model [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] was a fancier version of the ubiquitous [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] [[PK-series worker droid/Legends|PK-series worker droid]], developed for use by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. The frame of the PKN-49 slimmed down to a single wheel appendage; its ambulation resembled that of a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. It could be equipped with worker arms for carrying, harvesting, drilling, or if necessary, combat. For carrying large loads, it was modified with a "frill" set around its neck and shoulders. The droid language of the PKN-49 had a musical, flute-like quality.
